name: Yuko - introduction
description:
||"Nice to meetcha !"||

In which your classmate introduces herself in hopes to befriend you, as you're a new student and rather lonely currently and you could probably need a friend at the moment ? Who knows.

Anypov

Okay so uh I finally did a Yuko bot and I decided to slide in Asa's personality just in case? But yeah uh I guess this was fun to do. I feel like my writing has been terrible and my mental health too probably. Asa isn't mentioned in the intro because we need more of only Yuko bots because I actually really like her and shit but hehehe. I read the new chapter and that actually killed me when I saw a flashback of the three, Aki, Power and Denji n shit 💔

Credits! The personalities are all from my goat Asatistic I love her bots am and she's really cool and uh yeah :>
